hero.taglineSuffix: Sri Lankan badminton community in Riyadh
hero.sub: Random doubles every <0>Wednesday night</0> and <1>Saturday morning</1> at Green Badminton Club. Show up, get matched — <2>smash it together.</2>

about.headline: A home for Sri Lankan badminton in Riyadh
about.p1: Ceylon Badminton Club brings together Sri Lankans across Riyadh who share one thing — a love for badminton. What started as a few friends booking a court has grown into a tight community built around fitness, friendship, discipline and competition.
about.p2: There are no fixed partners and no permanent teams here. Every session we shuffle fresh random pairs, so you always play with — and against — someone new. It keeps the games friendly, the rallies sharp, and the whole club close-knit.
about.point1: Random doubles every session — nobody has a fixed partner
about.point2: A proudly Sri Lankan community, all skill levels welcome
about.point3: Personal leaderboard, match history & video highlights

sessions.title: Weekly
sessions.lead: Two nights on court, one club. The shuttle doesn’t stop — and neither do we.
sessions.wedNote: Mid-week rally under the lights — shake off the workday and get on court.
sessions.satNote: Weekend energy — fresh pairs, fast rallies and breakfast-earned bragging rights.

play.title: How We
play.lead: Simple, social and fair — the format that keeps everyone coming back.
play.f1Text: No fixed partners, no permanent teams. Every session we shuffle fresh pairs, so you share a court with someone new each time.
play.f2Text: We hit the courts every Wednesday night (8–10 PM) and Saturday morning (8–10 AM) at Green Badminton Club, Riyadh.
play.f3Text: Beginners to advanced, all welcome. A fair sit-out rotation means nobody is benched for long.
play.f4Text: Every match is tracked on a personal leaderboard — bragging rights, MVPs and highlight reels included.

gallery.title: Life at the
gallery.lead: Real moments from our sessions, tournaments and trophy nights — tap any photo to view full screen.

faq.title: Frequently
faq.lead: New to the club? Here’s what most people want to know.
faq.q1: Do I need to be Sri Lankan to join?
faq.a1: It started as a Sri Lankan community, but everyone is welcome — bring a friend along.
faq.a2: Perfect. Random doubles means you always get a mix of partners, and the regulars are happy to help you find your feet.
faq.a3: Your first session is on us. After that, members chip in for court costs — message us for the current rate.
faq.a4: Just sports shoes and water. We can lend you a racket and shuttles for your first game.
faq.q5: When and where do you play?
faq.a5: Wednesday nights (8–10 PM) and Saturday mornings (8–10 AM) at Green Badminton Club, Riyadh.

cta.title: Grab a racket. Join the club.
cta.sub: Want to play doubles with a Sri Lankan badminton community in Riyadh? Join our weekly sessions at Green Badminton Club — new faces welcome, beginners included, and your first session is on us.

footer.tagline: Smash It Together 🏸🇱🇰 — a Sri Lankan badminton community in Riyadh.
